tags.description: M Toilet 318

Men's restroom. Quick note, in the tags, this is marked as mens. In the OpenStreetMap display system, all bathrooms are marked with a unisex image. People will assume this is a prank, then they will zoom in and see the formal notation in the tags.
Beach house with restrooms and showers. The watercraft rental office is also here.
Two modern outhouse style bathrooms, hand sanitizer despisers.
